chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reasons Behind Hajj

text: 2109 - قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «سُمِّيَتِ اَلْكَعْبَةُ كَعْبَةً لِأَنَّهَا وَسَطُ اَلدُّنْيَا ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2109 - The Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said:
"The Ka'bah was named 'Ka'bah' because it is the center of the world."
